industry_context.summary: Car rental operators run multi-location fleets where revenue per available vehicle day is the operating metric. Buying decisions are driven by counter speed, fleet utilization, OTA/broker reach, and the cost of switching off legacy systems.
key_kpis: OTA mix vs. direct booking share
common_pains: Slow counter check-in/out and queues at peak times
Manual rate management across channels and seasons
Reconciling reservations from multiple sources (direct, OTA, broker, insurance replacement)
Fleet idle time and rebalancing across locations
Limited online booking conversion vs. counter walk-ins

buyer_segments.label: Local Independent
buyer_segments.description: Single or small multi-location operators looking to automate manual processes and reduce errors.

buyer_segments.label: Multi-Location Independent
buyer_segments.description: Operators with 2-10 locations and 25-200 vehicles. High inbound call volume across locations, staffing pressure during peak periods, and benefit most from 24/7 automated coverage. Primary Carla ICP.

buyer_segments.label: National Independent
buyer_segments.description: Growing fleets that need real fleet management and consolidated reporting across sites.

buyer_segments.label: National Franchisee
buyer_segments.description: Franchisees of major brands who need controls, brand-compliant rate setups, and reporting.

buyer_segments.label: International Franchisor
buyer_segments.description: Multi-brand, multi-region operators needing common systems, localization, and central control.

discovery_copy.search_suffix: independent car rental fleet reservations official website contact US
discovery_copy.contact_priority: owner > managing director > general manager > operations manager > fleet manager > branch manager
discovery_copy.tech_maturity_hint: 1=no web/email, 3=basic site, 5=full online booking + payments + channel/OTA mentions
discovery_copy.country_code_examples: GB for United Kingdom, ES for Spain
discovery_copy.mix_guidance: Include independents, regional chains, and franchisees of major brands. Avoid listing the major brand itself unless you mean a specific franchisee location.

icp.description: Industry-level ICP for car rental. Targets buyers running rental counters and back-office operations — online booking is NOT a strong signal here, since rental management software is primarily a back-office and counter system. Product packs may layer additional weighting on top.

criteria.label: Fleet of 25+ vehicles — operational complexity that justifies a rental management system
Low/mid tech maturity — modernization opportunity for a back-office RMS upgrade; high-maturity operators likely already entrenched on a competitor
Clear decision-making authority — independents, multi-location operators, or franchisees with budget control
Operates beyond walk-in counter rentals — insurance replacement, airport transfer, van hire, long-term lease, or fleet management = multiple booking sources and rate complexity that CARS+ excels at
